## Logs

Attach Needlelight logs if available.

Typical locations:

Windows: %APPDATA%/needlelight/logs
Linux: ~/.config/needlelight/logs
macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/needlelight/logs

## Troubleshooting Tried

- [ ] Restarted Needlelight
- [ ] Restarted the game
- [ ] Reinstalled the mod
- [ ] Disabled other mods
